require the skills of a licensed nurse and, therefore, is not considered to be a skilled 
nursing service. If the patient needs someone only to prefill syringes (and therefore 
needs no skilled nursing care on an intermittent basis, physical therapy, or speech-
language pathology services), the patient, therefore, does not qualify for any Medicare
